title: DRY package docs/source server stack

source.subject: refactor(server): DRY package docs/source stack and FastEndpoints Send conventions

body:
## Outcome

DRY package docs/source stack and FastEndpoints Send conventions.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).

## Provenance
